string.text: Crouch key always crouches. Walk/Low Crouch key always goes prone. Bind Walk below for the only way to walk. Sprint is unchanged. Uses your game crouch/walk hold or toggle settings; both must match.
Intercept crouch and walk/low-crouch keys and map them directly to crouch and prone poses.
Only way to enter walk mode. Follows your game hold/toggle setting for walk.
Show current pose in the debug overlay.
Write pose changes to the game log file.
Cannot mix crouch/walk toggle modes with Dorns Pose Controls
